name: python3-atomic-operator-runner
title: python3-atomic-operator-runner
summary: executes powershell, cmd or bash/sh commands both locally or remotely
description:
executes powershell, cmd or bash/sh commands both locally or remotely
This module allows you to:
* Execute a command string on a local, remote Windows, remote macOS and
remote Linux systems
* Execute a command for PowerShell, command-line (cmd) and bash/sh on any
of the above systems
* Can execute commands elevated on the supported systems
* Returns a standard response object, as well as displays a formatter
version to the console via logging
* Copy a file from a local to remote host
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for atomic-operator-runner.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use atomic-operator-runner because executes powershell, cmd or bash/sh commands both locally or remotely.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use atomic-operator-runner as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `atomic-operator-runner [options] [args]` as documented upstream for atomic-operator-runner.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair atomic-operator-runner with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `atomic-operator-runner --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
